summary: Frontend-only MA PULOSARI v3.0 React app fully tested. All 16 public pages, login (3 demo accounts), 16 admin pages, 7 teacher pages, 7 OSIS pages load successfully. Critical branding propagation (Settings -> navbar/footer/login via BrandingContext + localStorage) verified working. Role-based redirect, logout, forgot-password, FAQ accordion, gallery lightbox, and PPDB form submission with toast all working. No backend testing performed (per request - app is fully mocked).
critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext does not implement role-validated route guard at provider level. DashboardLayout enforces requiredRole correctly via redirect (verified: teacher accessing /admin -> /teacher).
Branding state is duplicated in localStorage by both useState initializer AND useEffect on every change. Acceptable for mock-only app but could cause SSR hydration mismatch if migrated.
MOCK_USERS passwords are stored in plaintext in source - acceptable for demo/MVP but must be replaced when backend integration starts.
All public pages load fast (<1s) and use consistent green gradient (#064e3b -> #10b981) on hero/CTAs/sidebar as specified.

data-testid coverage is good on critical elements (login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-btn, demo-btn-{role}, settings-school-name, settings-save, sidebar-logout-btn) - test automation friendly.
test_credentials: admin@mapulosari.sch.id/admin123, guru@mapulosari.sch.id/guru123, osis@mapulosari.sch.id/osis123 (all working, documented in /app/memory/test_credentials.md)
seed_data_creation: None needed - all data is mocked in /app/frontend/src/data/mockData.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure frontend React app with NO backend. Auth + branding via localStorage (keys: ma_pulosari_auth_v1, ma_pulosari_branding_v2). Role-based redirect handled in DashboardLayout via requiredRole prop. Branding propagates correctly to navbar+footer+login via BrandingContext. All 46 routes (16 public + 3 auth + 16 admin + 7 teacher + 7 osis + catchall) function. All toasts via sonner work (login welcome, PPDB success, etc.). Approve/reject buttons exist in /admin/approval - filter chip text 'Disetujui' may collide with action button text in selectors; use specific data-testid if adding new tests.

tests_executed.auth_flows: demo-btn-admin auto-fill OK, login admin->/admin OK, login guru->/teacher OK, login osis->/osis OK, logout->/login OK, role-based redirect (teacher accessing /admin -> /teacher) OK, forgot-password success message OK
tests_executed.branding_propagation: School name 'MA PULOSARI TEST' updated via /admin/settings, persisted in localStorage, propagated to public navbar (verified), footer (verified), login page (verified)
tests_executed.interactive_features: FAQ accordion expand/collapse OK, gallery lightbox opens on thumbnail click OK, PPDB form submission shows success toast 'Pendaftaran Anda berhasil dikirim! Silakan cek email konfirmasi.' OK
